notes.title: Home Screen Widgets
notes.body: New widgets for your home screen: dhikr counter, next dhikr, weekly streak, articles, and a Control Center widget (iOS 18+).

notes.title: Spotlight Search
notes.body: Search for adhkar, articles, and hadiths right from Spotlight.

notes.title: VoiceOver Support
notes.body: Improved VoiceOver accessibility with localized spoken labels across the app.

notes.title: Reading Experience
notes.body: Go to Unread button, auto-scroll to first unread zikr, and per-category page indicators.

notes.title: Dark & Tinted App Icons
notes.body: New dark and tinted variants for app icons.

notes.title: Tatar Language
notes.body: Added Tatar language support.

notes.title: Share Updates
notes.body: Updated the Share Dhikr section with new fonts and backgrounds.

notes.title: 100 Duas Collection
notes.body: 100 Duas from the Quran and Sunnah available as a separate category.

notes.title: Updated Color Scheme
notes.body: Updated default color scheme for a refreshed appearance.

notes.title: New Icons
notes.body: New icons throughout the app.

notes.title: Lock Screen Widget
notes.body: Track your daily reading progress directly from your iOS lock screen with a custom widget.

notes.title: Enhanced Sharing
notes.body: Enhanced sharing capabilities for dhikr content.

notes.title: Transliteration Settings
notes.body: Customizable transliteration settings with DIN 31635 romanization support.

notes.title: Transliteration Settings
notes.body: Customizable transliteration settings with DIN 31635 romanization support.

notes.title: New Themes & Fonts
notes.body: Added new themes and fonts for more comfortable reading.

notes.title: Enhanced Share
notes.body: Enhanced Share function with the ability to add background images and additional settings.

notes.title: New Themes
notes.body: Fresh themes added for a better visual experience.

notes.title: New Fonts
notes.body: List of custom fonts was extended.

notes.title: Enhanced Sharing
notes.body: Now you can include a background image and customize sharing options even more.

notes.title: Tap Counter
notes.body: Count dhikr with taps while reading.

notes.title: Collection Source Picker
notes.subtitle: Fortress of Muslim
notes.body: Adhkar collection source picker with morning and evening adhkar in Fortress of the Muslim order.

notes.title: Collection Source Picker
notes.subtitle: Fortress of Muslim
notes.body: Adhkar collection source picker with morning and evening adhkar in Fortress of the Muslim order.

notes.title: Reading Mode
notes.body: New Reading Mode option in Text Settings.

notes.title: Dua of Night of Power
notes.body: Added Dua of The Night of Power.

notes.title: Adhkar Articles
notes.body: Adhkar related articles are now available.

notes.title: Ayat-al-Kursi Restored
notes.body: Added Ayat-al-Kursi back to morning and evening categories.

notes.title: Search
notes.body: Search through adhkar content.

notes.title: Search
notes.body: Search through adhkar content.

notes.title: Search Functionality
notes.body: This version introduces search functionality in the app. Try it from the main menu.

notes.title: Support for Additional Languages
notes.subtitle: 6 languages added
notes.body: This version adds translations for Georgian, Ingush, Chechen, Uzbek, Kyrgyz and Kazakh.

notes.title: Virtues of Dhikr Widget
notes.subtitle: Lock screen too
notes.body: Virtues of dhikr widget with support for lock screen.

notes.title: New Bedtime Adhkar Category
notes.body: New bedtime adhkar category added.

notes.title: Counter Reset on Launch
notes.subtitle: Reset on launch
notes.body: The dhikr counter now resets on each app launch.

notes.subtitle: 6 languages added
notes.body: This version adds translations for Georgian, Ingush, Chechen, Uzbek, Kyrgyz and Kazakh.

notes.title: Virtues of Dhikr Widget
notes.body: Azkar now has a widget which displays different virtues of remembrance of Allah.

notes.title: New Bedtime Adhkar Category
notes.body: Part of the evening adhkar was split into a new category.

notes.title: Audio Text Highlighting
notes.body: When audio is playing, Azkar will highlight the text being recited if Smart line-breaks is enabled.

notes.title: Floating Counter
notes.body: Dhikr counter as a floating button.

notes.title: Share Dhikr
notes.subtitle: Text or image
notes.body: Share a dhikr as text or image.

notes.title: Line Spacing
notes.body: Implemented text line spacing adjustment changing option.

notes.title: English Language
notes.body: This is the first release of Azkar app in English language.

notes.title: First Release
notes.body: The first release of Azkar app.
